title: coniogramme robusta var. robusta
intro: Coniogramme robusta var. robusta, also known as the robust coniogramme, is a species of flowering plant in the family Compositae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Coniogramme robusta var. robusta include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can be dried and made into a tea to utilize its medicinal properties.
